title: Paras Hinduja Passport  How to Create a Project in monday.com?

posts.cookedHtml:
Hi All,

I’m Paras Hinduja, a passport expert dedicated to simplifying the passport application, renewal, and replacement process. Can anyone share their experience How to Create a Project in monday.com ?

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
Which product (CRM/Work Management, etc) and level (Pro/Enterprise) do you have? I ask because I’m trying to clarify if you mean the ‘Project/Portfolio’ solution or just a board that can be used as a project.

Desiree - www.thecleverclovers.com
